query:
SELECT 'tenants' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM tenants
UNION ALL
SELECT 'license_keys', COUNT(*) FROM license_keys
UNION ALL
SELECT 'upload_sessions', COUNT(*) FROM upload_sessions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'shelf_data', COUNT(*) FROM shelf_data;
